hero.question: Will Rachida Dati win the Paris mayor election?
hero.prob_take: Dati's odds jumped 4.5 points in 24 hours on $600K volume, suggesting recent polling or endorsement news has spooked the field and shifted money toward the center-right candidate. At 11.5%, she's still priced like a long shot despite being the official Republican pick in a fragmented race where the top three candidates are separated by single digits.

daily_take.headline: Paris Mayor Race Just Repriced. Smart Money Sees Dati Path.
daily_take.deck: Rachida Dati's odds jumped 4.5 points to 11.5% in 24 hours on fresh momentum. The market's been sleeping on her anti-immigration, pro-business pitch resonating with centrist and right-leaning Paris voters. At these odds, you're getting a discount on a credible spoiler who could split the left vote and win a fragmented field. The volume surge ($600K) suggests sophisticated money just woke up to the value.

sidebar.headline: DHS shutdown odds exploded 10 points overnight. Congress might actually avoid the cliff this time, but this feels like panic buying, not conviction. Wait for the March recess madness before piling in.
sidebar.label: DHS Shutdown End: 76.9%

sidebar.headline: Murray's assist line collapsed 26 points in one day. That's not a market correction, that's a blowout move suggesting the public finally figured out what sharps knew last week. Verify the injury report before chasing.
sidebar.label: Murray Assists O/U 8.5: 11.8%

sidebar.headline: Anduril IPO odds dropped 22 points to 25%. Defense contractors rarely move this fast on negative news alone. Check if a recent funding round or strategic pivot just killed their 2026 window.
sidebar.label: Anduril IPO Before 2027: 25.0%
